company_data.accreditation_line: Accredited Calibration Laboratory validated by Accredia  LAT No. 042 (fake)

organization_data.accreditation_body: Certificate issued by internal laboratory procedure validated by Accredia LAT No. 042
organization_data.reproduction_conditions: Partial or full reproduction requires written authorization from the laboratory.
organization_data.traceability_statement: Metrological traceability chain linked to INRIM national standards via accredited calibration certificates.

sensor_method_template.calibration_method: Internal procedure validated by the quality service laboratory approved by Accredia based on the comparison method in a controlled oven with a reference, Pt100 platinum resistance thermometer read by Fluke 1502A metrology well.
measurement_conditions: Reference standard: Pt100 Platinum Resistance Thermometer read by Fluke 1502A readout (U=0.065 °C, k=2)
Sensor under calibration: DIGITAL thermometer (Measurestream electronics, model 0001-3)
Settling period: 10 min between each acquisition step
traceability_labs: INRIM - Istituto Nazionale di Ricerca Metrologica, Turin
sensor_method_template.traceability: Metrological traceability linked to INRIM national standards via accredited certificates LAT-042-2025-0318 and LAT-042-2025-0319.
sensor_method_template.starting_uncertainties: Reference PT100/Fluke 1502A: U=0.065 °C, k=2. NTC ADC: half-width d=0.30 °C (uniform). Coverage factor k=2, confidence level ~95%.
notes_template: Results refer to the instrument under calibration under the declared conditions.
Uncertainties are determined according to ISO/IEC Guide 98-3 (GUM) and EA-4/02.
Coverage factor k = 2, confidence level about 95 %.
Reference instrument: Fluke 1502A thermometer readout + Pt100 probe (U=0.065 °C, k=2).
Sensor under calibration: DIGITAL thermometer (Measurestream electronics, model 0001-3).

ntc_model.method_description: GUM-compliant Ordinary Least Squares (OLS) linear regression in the 16-bit LSB domain. The calibration model is T_ref_lsb = A * T_sensor_lsb + B, where T_ref_lsb are the PT100 reference readings (converted to LSB) and T_sensor_lsb are the raw NTC ADC readings. Uncertainty propagation follows ISO/IEC Guide 98-3 (GUM).
observations: Results refer exclusively to the instrument identified in this certificate.
Calibration is valid under the declared conditions and on the execution date.
Reference temperature T_ref measured by PT100/Fluke 1502A (mean per step).
Sensor temperature T_sensor measured by NTC via TMP126 ADC (mean per step).

_notes_computed: Results refer to the instrument under calibration under the declared conditions.

pdf_template_data.footer_left_text: Calibration Centre Measurestream 001 — Calibration certificate MS-CAL-2026-00419
pdf_template_data.intro_text: This certificate is issued in compliance with the laboratory internal procedure PRO-CAL-MST-003. The results refer exclusively to the identified DIGITAL thermometer and to the declared calibration conditions. After having identified the F. taratura, the calibration function is: T = A \u00b7 D + B. The calibration was determined over 6 calibration points (0 °C to 125 °C) using a Fluke 1502A metrology well readout and Pt100 reference thermometer.
statements: The reported results are valid only under the calibration conditions stated in this certificate.
Partial or full reproduction is permitted only with written authorization from the laboratory.
Expanded uncertainty is expressed with coverage factor k = 2 (confidence level about 95%).
pdf_template_data.procedure_text_template:
Procedure N. {procedure_code}
Traceability starts from first-line standards N. {chain_ids}
with valid calibration certificates N. {cert_ids} issued by {cert_labs} with A.
notes_lines: Temperatures are expressed in Celsius degrees according to the ITS-90 scale.
Reference temperature T_ref: mean of PT100 (Fluke 1502A) readings at each calibration step.
T_c: reading of the DIGITAL thermometer under calibration at each step.
M_e = T_c - T_ref (signed temperature difference in °C).
Measurement uncertainty U(E) is expanded (k=2), confidence level about 95 %.
pdf_template_data.measurement_note_template: Calibration was performed with measurement current {measurement_current} and a {connection_terminals}-terminal connection.
pdf_template_data.page4_intro_text: Nella seguente tabella sono riportati i coefficienti dell'equazione lineare di taratura:

_calibration_result._method_description: GUM-compliant Ordinary Least Squares (OLS) linear regression in the 16-bit LSB domain. The calibration model is T_ref_lsb = A * T_sensor_lsb + B, where T_ref_lsb are the PT100 reference readings (converted to LSB) and T_sensor_lsb are the raw NTC ADC readings. Uncertainty propagation follows ISO/IEC Guide 98-3 (GUM).
